2_primaryJTBD.decision: How is my golf performance trending and what should I focus on?

4_visualHierarchy.assessment: GOOD - Clear tab-based hierarchy with visual separation

kpis.note: Identifies performance inflection points with recommendations
Shows % of goal achieved with visual progress bars

5_kpiQuality.assessment: EXCELLENT - Majority are actionable leading indicators

6_languageAndMentalModel.assessment: MODERATE - Mix of Norwegian and English, mostly passive language

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: GOOD - 2-3 clicks to reach detailed content

8_stateCoverage.assessment: GOOD - Loading and empty states for integrated sections
gaps: Mock data mixed with real API calls (TrenderTab fetches real data, others use mocks)

scalabilityIssues: Overwhelming for beginners - 4 tabs with dense analytics
Mixed mock/real data suggests incomplete implementation
No progressive disclosure - shows all complexity at once
9_roleScalability.recommendation: Add beginner mode with simplified view + complete API integration

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Comprehensive analytics hub with good KPIs but mixed data sources

topIssues.issue: Mixed mock and real data across tabs - incomplete implementation
topIssues.impact: Some tabs show fake data, confusing for users

topIssues.issue: Overwhelming for beginners with 4 dense analytics tabs
topIssues.impact: High learning curve, may intimidate new users

topIssues.issue: No error handling for API failures
topIssues.impact: Poor experience if data fetch fails

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Complete API integration for all tabs + add progressive disclosure (simple/advanced toggle) + comprehensive error handling

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader pattern (consistent). Tab-based navigation unique to this page. Integration with breaking points, training areas, and player insights shows good cross-feature coordination.

stateHandling.loading: Loading spinners for breaking points, training areas, insights
stateHandling.empty: Empty state messages for each section

dataSource.note: TrenderTab fetches real API data, other tabs use mock data

overallAssessment: GOOD - Comprehensive analytics with strong KPIs but needs complete API integration and beginner-friendly mode
